title: Workflow Feedback Loop Maturity v1

decisions.brief: Define a feedback-loop maturity spec before graph-specific tasks
v1 feedback sources are DecisionGraph and InsightExplorationGraph only
OutcomeGraph v1 supports DecisionOutcome and InsightCandidateOutcome, not a generic TrackedOutcome
Outcome labels use normalized label, metrics, reason codes, and evidence refs
EvaluationGraph v1 outputs metrics plus strengths, weaknesses, failure modes, and data gaps
InsightExplorationGraph v1 is driven by EvaluationReport, context snapshot summaries, and outcome labels
Do not migrate OutcomeGraph, EvaluationGraph, or InsightExplorationGraph to native LangGraph in v1
Implementation order is OutcomeGraph, then EvaluationGraph, then InsightExplorationGraph
T010 adds a narrow InsightCandidateOutcome backend contract in v1
InsightExplorationGraph schedules InsightCandidateOutcome after creating InsightCandidate
InsightCandidate carries one whitelisted horizon and backend derives due_at
InsightExplorationGraph uses 2m when candidate semantics do not clearly select a horizon

insight_candidate_outcome_scheduling.outcome_graph_role: fetch due InsightCandidateOutcome records and label them only
forbidden: OutcomeGraph decides what new insight outcomes to observe
manual CLI scheduling as the primary v1 flow

horizon_contract.default_policy: use 2m only when candidate semantics do not clearly select another whitelisted horizon
horizon_contract.due_at_policy: normal schedule requests provide horizon; backend derives due_at as scheduled_at plus horizon
horizon_contract.frequency_scope: short-cycle intraday validation only; no daily or monthly horizons in v1
horizon_contract.override_policy: manual/admin due_at override is recovery-only and must include a reason code
horizon_contract.outcome_graph_role: read horizon and due_at only; do not choose or mutate horizon

outcome_evidence_loading.trigger: before label evaluation when current short-cycle evidence is needed

acceptance.check: Feedback-loop handoff defines source types, scheduling owner, horizon contract, outcome label contract, evaluation report contract, and insight input contract
OutcomeGraph task is present with scope, steps, dependencies, and verification
EvaluationGraph task is present with scope, steps, dependencies, and verification
InsightExplorationGraph task is present with scope, steps, dependencies, and verification
Spec and tasks do not include AlphaResearchGraph implementation, native graph migration, custom UI, execution, RulePack mutation, or automatic promotion

non_goals: native LangGraph migration for these three graphs

verification.command: Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 .agent-dev/specs/workflow-feedback-loop-maturity-v1/spec.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 .agent-dev/specs/workflow-feedback-loop-maturity-v1/decision-record.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 .agent-dev/specs/workflow-feedback-loop-maturity-v1/clarification-questions.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null
verification.expect: Feedback-loop spec and clarification JSON files parse

verification.command: Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 .agent-dev/tasks/T010-outcome-graph-maturity-v1.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 .agent-dev/tasks/T011-evaluation-graph-maturity-v1.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 .agent-dev/tasks/T012-insight-exploration-graph-maturity-v1.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null
verification.expect: All graph task JSON files parse

verification.command: manual review: compare spec non_goals and task files against the current diff
verification.expect: No forbidden implementation scope is pulled into v1
No whitespace errors in planning artifacts
Private AI context routing tests still pass
Insight exploration consumes evaluation reports, context summaries, and outcome labels while producing bounded pending InsightCandidate records

verification.command: cd apps/trader-workflows && npx tsx --test src/services/outcomes.test.ts src/services/insightCandidates.test.ts src/graphs/03-insightExploration/insightExplorationGraph.test.ts
verification.expect: InsightCandidateOutcome scheduling uses the whitelisted horizon contract, backend-derived due_at, evidence refs, no auto-promotion, and forbidden API boundaries
Workflow package CLI/export/docs-facing behavior remains compatible after optional insights output or evaluation-report input changes
